steps.title: Identify Grande's emotion
steps.content: The underlined portion says Mago's reduced interest in the Barbie 'made me sad' because the doll had been the only thing Mago envied Grande for. Its function is to explain Grande's sadness about Mago's disinterest.

steps.title: Reject misread functions
steps.content: Choice B names anger instead of sadness. Choice C says the line gives an example of how the sisters played, and Choice D says it explains Mago's unwillingness; the underlined portion explains Grande's reaction, not Mago's motive. The answer is A.
